text:
This bug isn't too old, is it? I can't even reeber where did I get version 0.0.10 from... It surely was there - somewhere on github or closer... but not anymore.

So let it be 0.0.9. Updating patch. Redports build is at https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140715204100-28449/
